_description: Merge the mcpServers block into your OpenClaw config.
Replace PATH_TO_REPO and PATH_TO_PROJECT with absolute paths.
DEGRADED MODE: OpenClaw preRequest/postResponse hooks are not yet
implemented (upstream issue #28596), so auto-memory is not available.
The agent calls memory_prepare_turn / memory_finalize_turn explicitly
per SKILL.md. Watch the upstream issue for when full hook support lands.
